case_title: CLAIRE LAVAUTE VS. GUSTIN MINGSUN HO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO GUSTIN MING SUN HO ( AKA GUS MINGSUN HO) 90 STSEMO WAY, SAN FRANCISCOC. 94127 415-971-5401
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 -
